tasks.subject: Task 0: Pure hero-puzzle seam + bundled bank + 7 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship `public/js/ui/hero-puzzle.js` with a bundled fallback puzzle bank, `pickBundledPuzzle({ seen })`, `classifyOutcome(puzzle, guess)`, and full unit-test coverage. No DOM, no socket, no integration yet.

**Files:**
- Create: `public/js/ui/hero-puzzle.js` (~85 LOC pure zero-import)
- Create: `client-tests/hero-puzzle.test.js` (~140 LOC, 7 tests)
- Modify: `public/js/ui.js` (single new `export * from` line)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- BUNDLED_PUZZLES exports Object.freeze'd 3-entry array; unique pairIds; well-formed shape; non-empty validActorTmdbIds; revealActor present.
- pickBundledPuzzle({ seen }) honors seen; falls back to full bank when all seen; default-args behave like seen=[].
- classifyOutcome correct/incorrect/invalid paths.
- hero-puzzle.js pure: grep finds no `import`, `document`, `window`, `Date.now`, `setTimeout`, `setInterval`.
- ui.js gains one re-export line.
- Pre-existing 570 tests stay green → 577 total.

**Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/hero-puzzle.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent` → 7 green, 577 total.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/hero-puzzle.js", "client-tests/hero-puzzle.test.js", "public/js/ui.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/hero-puzzle.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BUNDLED_PUZZLES frozen 3-entry array, unique pairIds, well-formed shape", "pickBundledPuzzle honors seen with fallback-to-full + default-args", "classifyOutcome handles correct/incorrect/invalid", "hero-puzzle.js is pure (grep: no import/document/window/Date.now/setTimeout/setInterval)", "ui.js gains one re-export line", "Suite 570 → 577 green (+7 T0)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Server module + 3 socket events + DOM + driver + 10 integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the full stack — server bank/validator/person-search, 3 new pre-room socket events (`heroPuzzleRequest`, `heroActorSearch`, `heroGuessSubmit`), hero markup replacement, driver mount, integration tests. No new CSS yet.

**Files:**
- Create: `server/heroPuzzle.js` (~80 LOC)
- Create: `server/hero-puzzle.test.js` (~80 LOC, 4 tests)
- Modify: `server/socketHandlers.js` — append 3 new `on(...)` listeners (cannot route through matchSystem.autocompleteSearch — lobby-required; hero is pre-room)
- Modify: `public/index.html` — replace `.hero-demo` block (lines ~154–186)
- Create: `public/js/ui/hero-puzzle-controller.js` (~150 LOC)
- Modify: `public/js/ui.js` (second re-export)
- Modify: `public/js/app.js` — mountHeroPuzzle(socket) on init
- Create: `client-tests/hero-puzzle-controller.test.js` (~200 LOC, 6 integration tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- mountHeroPuzzle idempotent (single heroPuzzleRequest emit).
- First paint: 2 `.reel-node` + 1 `.reel-bridge.reel-bridge--unsolved`.
- heroPuzzleDelivered swaps only when state=awaiting-guess AND input empty.
- 200ms debounced heroActorSearch.
- Clicking `.autocomplete-item` emits heroGuessSubmit + flips data-state=checking.
- heroGuessResult fills bridge + paints outcome card (correct → "Nailed it", incorrect → "Almost—connection was X").
- Show me click reveals locally from _currentPuzzle.revealActor, no socket emit.
- Server validateGuess: correct/incorrect/{ok:false,reason:'unknown-pair'}.
- Server toClientPuzzle strips validActorTmdbIds (spec §3.3 strict secret) but keeps revealActor (for local Show Me on server puzzles).
- SACROSANCT suites byte-identical + green.
- Suite 587 total (+10 T1).

**Verify:** `npm test --silent` → 587 green. Sacrosanct files byte-identical via `git diff`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/heroPuzzle.js", "server/hero-puzzle.test.js", "server/socketHandlers.js", "public/index.html", "public/js/ui/hero-puzzle-controller.js", "public/js/ui.js", "public/js/app.js", "client-tests/hero-puzzle-controller.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mountHeroPuzzle idempotent (single heroPuzzleRequest emit)", "First paint: 2 .reel-node + 1 .reel-bridge.reel-bridge--unsolved", "heroPuzzleDelivered swaps only when awaiting-guess + empty input", "200ms debounced heroActorSearch", "Clicking .autocomplete-item emits heroGuessSubmit + flips state to checking", "heroGuessResult fills bridge and paints outcome card", "Show me click reveals locally, no socket emit", "Server validateGuess: correct/incorrect/unknown-pair", "Server toClientPuzzle strips validActorTmdbIds (secret) but keeps revealActor", "Sacrosanct suites byte-identical and green", "Suite 587 total (+10 T1)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CSS append — Playable Hero shell styles (zero deletions)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Visual styling for the hero-puzzle surface. Append-only — zero edits to pre-existing rules. Existing `.filmstrip`/`.reel-node`/`.reel-bridge` rules from `03-game.css` supply the live-game aesthetic.

**Files:**
- Modify: `public/css/02-hero-lobby.css` — append "Phase 7.9 — Playable Hero" section at EOF (~50 LOC)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- New banner-commented "Phase 7.9 — Playable Hero" section appended at EOF.
- Rules added (additive only): .hero-puzzle-mount, .hero-puzzle-prompt, .reel-bridge--unsolved (+ heroBridgePulse keyframes), .hero-puzzle-input, #hero-puzzle-search (focus + base), .hero-puzzle-skip, .hero-puzzle-outcome (+ heroOutcomeFadeIn keyframes), state-driven selectors (#hero-puzzle[data-state="checking"], #hero-puzzle[data-state^="revealed-"]).
- Two scoped @media queries (999px tablet, 639px mobile).
- NO edits to pre-existing rules: `git diff --stat` shows insertions only, ZERO deletions.
- No new color tokens.
- Compositor-only animations.
- Suite stays at 587 green.
- 03-game.css byte-identical vs origin/main.

**Verify:** `npm test --silent && git diff --stat public/css/02-hero-lobby.css` → 587 green; insertions > 0, deletions == 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/02-hero-lobby.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --silent && git diff --stat public/css/02-hero-lobby.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Phase 7.9 banner section appended at EOF", ".hero-puzzle-* rules + .reel-bridge--unsolved + state-driven visibility selectors all present", "Two scoped @media queries (999px tablet, 639px mobile)", "Zero edits to pre-existing rules (no `-` in diff)", "No new color tokens", "Compositor-only animations (opacity, no layout-triggering transforms)", "Suite stays at 587 green", "03-game.css byte-identical vs origin/main"]}
```
